productDisplayName: Puma Men Cardiac II Red Watches
description: This watch from puma from the Cardiac series comes in a heart friendly design. The feature packed dial gives this watch a futursitic appearance perfect for navigating the urban terrain.Case diameter: 40 mmCase thickness: 12 mmDial shape: SquareWarranty: 2 YearsPlastic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Textured PU straps with a buckle clasp for comfort and styleBlack dial with cat logo above the reset bucklesDigital dial showing time, heart rate monitor, chronograph, count-down timer and alarmReset buttons on the sideQuartz movement of time displayAcrylic dial window for better durability Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant upto 50 metres
